content:
✔ Why This Works:
✔ Prevents excessive instability while keeping leadership dynamic.
✔ Encourages strategic decision-making for both leaders and challengers.
✔ Forces players to weigh the risks of challenging leadership.

📜 2. Archetype Customization – Outfits, Weapons, & Starting Items

📜 Every archetype must select an outfit, weapon/tool, and a personal starting item.

✔ Character Customization Options:
1️⃣ Outfits – Each Archetype Grouping Gets Three Choices
• Warriors & Guardians: Battle-worn cloak, Imperial armor, or Tactician’s garb.
• Oracles & Tricksters: Shadowed robe, Alchemist’s vestments, or Magician’s attire.
• Wanderers & Archivists: Traveling scholar’s cloak, Seafarer’s coat, or Historian’s garb.
